name: Switchyard
description: Cargo rails vibrate through the grating while floodlamps try and fail to make the fog honest.
detail: Every shadow here could be a courier, a thief, or someone paid to confuse the difference.

fixtures.name: cargo rails
fixtures.inspect: The rails hum with enough freight and rumor to make the whole district feel temporary.

mood: The freight bell is ringing on a schedule nobody recognises.
Tonight a Bureau van has been parked at the long curve for an hour with its lights off.
A fresh chalk mark on rail seven means a courier is praying to the timing again.
